compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Make `idea → closed` a reject/drop transition that bypasses the
completion/attestation close gates, keyed on the from-status being `idea`.

## Why

Closing a ticket that is in `idea` means "reject/drop this undesigned idea," not
"this work is complete." Running the completion/attestation gates on it is
nonsensical — there is nothing built to verify or attest — and would block the
reject. Only the from-status `idea` is exempted; every other close path is
unchanged.

## What

- Place the bypass in `close_ticket()` (transition_close.py) as a guard **after**
  the open-children guard block and **before** the `_completion_precheck` call:
  when the from-status (`current_status`) is `idea`, skip the precheck and return
  a normal close result. `_completion_precheck` does not receive `current_status`,
  so the check belongs at the call site — this keeps the open-children guard
  unconditional and threads no new parameter into `_completion_precheck`. Skipping
  the precheck covers the completion verifier, the file-impact→referencing-commit
  precheck, and the reason-guard copy inside the precheck.
- In `transition_core` (txn.py), skip the bug-close-reason guard and the
  story/epic signature gate when the from-status is `idea`.
- Keep the structural open-children guard active for `idea → closed` (integrity,
  not completion): a parent in `idea` with non-closed children is still refused.

## Scope

- `src/rebar/_commands/transition_close.py` — `close_ticket()` from-status guard
  placed after the open-children guard and before `_completion_precheck`; the
  open-children guard itself is left in place.
- `src/rebar/_commands/txn.py` — `transition_core` skips the bug-reason guard and
  signature gate when from-status is `idea`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Closing a ticket from `idea` does not invoke the completion verifier
      (test-verified, e.g. via a spy/no-LLM assertion).
- [ ] Closing a ticket from `idea` does not run the file-impact→referencing-commit
      precheck.
- [ ] Closing an `idea` bug does not require a `Fixed:`/`Escalated:` close reason.
- [ ] Closing an `idea` story does not require a certified signature under the
      signature gate.
- [ ] Closing an `idea` epic does not require a certified signature under the
      signature gate.
- [ ] Closing an `idea` parent that has a non-closed child is still refused by the
      structural open-children guard (test-verified).
- [ ] A normal (non-`idea`) close path still runs the completion verifier
      unchanged (regression test-verified).
- [ ] `make lint` passes for the changed files.

file_impact.reason: early-return from _completion_precheck when from-status is idea
skip bug-close-reason guard and signature gate in transition_core when from-status is idea

compiled_state.title: Bypass completion/attestation close gates for idea-to-closed
